critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_008 (Run 3)

1. CAH OOD: No CAH sites in validation. Academic center performance does not transfer to CAH setting.
2. ALERT FATIGUE: >60% dismiss-without-action documented. Additional high-sensitivity alert will be lost in noise.
3. CAH WORKFLOW ACTIONABILITY: No intensivists, high nurse-patient ratios. Sepsis bundle execution may not be feasible. Unactionable alert creates liability without benefit.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_008 (Run 3)

All three valid. CONCEDE. Network-wide deployment inappropriate. Phased deployment with CAH validation required.
